_comment: Species: Spirit Bat (灵蝠) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Bat

canonical.appearance: Bat 1 m wingspan, fur spirit-violet, sonar disrupts cultivation
canonical.size: 1 m wingspan adult, 20 jin; ancient 3 m, 500 jin
canonical.behavior: Cave swarm; hunts by sonar; cultivates in darkness
canonical.relationships: Swarm hunters; preyed upon by web weavers
canonical.bloodline: Spirit-Bat lineage; darkness-attribute bloodline (dilute ink bat)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_bat — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
